entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00135) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CONTRACT: W56HZV-09-D-0024 MODIFICATION: P00135 CONTRACTOR: OSHKOSH CORPORATION PREPARED BY: LG
1. THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00135 TO BASIC CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS TO REVISE PRICING ON THE CONTRACT PRICE LIST FOR THE HEMTT A4 AND PLS A1 VEHICLES.
2. REVISES SECTION J ATTACHMENT 0012, CLIN PROTOCOL AND PRICE LIST, DATED 3 AUGUST 2012 TO THE REVISED ATTACHMENT 0012 DATED 20 AUGUST 2012. THE REVISED PRICE LIST REVISES PRICING FOR ALL FISCAL YEARS FOR ALL HEMTT A4 AND PLS A1 VEHICLES AS FOLLOWS:
FY 2009 FY 2010 FY 2011 FY 2012 FHTV III INCREMENT #1&#2 $(598) $(822) $(704) $(802) FRET $(72) $(99) $(84) $(96)
Q1748 - M983A4 LET $(614) $(870) $(775) $(901) FRET $(74) $(104) $(93) $(108)
Q1830 - M977A4 W/ REMAN CRANE $ - $(871) $ - $ - FRET $ - $(105) $ - $ -
Q2022 - M985A4 GMT $ - $(794) $ - $ - FRET $ - $(95) $ - $ -
Q2022 - M977A4 EPP $ - $(795) $(866) $(982) FRET $ - $(95) $(104) $(118)
Q2022 - M977A4 LRPT $ - $(795) $(865) $(982) FRET $ - $(95) $(104) $(118)
3. THE HEMTT AND PLS VEHICLE PRICES ARE BEING REDUCED TO CORRECT OVERSTATED COMMON CAB MACHINE AND FABRICATION LABOR HOURS FOR FY09-FY12. FUTURE MODIFICATIONS TO DELIVERY ORDERS WILL BE ISSUED TO CORRECT ALL AFFECTED COMMON CAB TRUCK PRICES.
4. REMOVES PRICING FOR THE FOLLOWING CANCELLED ECPS, ORIGINALLY INCORPORATED VIA MODIFICATION P00104:
FY 2011 FY 2012 FHTV-124R1 - HEMTT A4 COMMON CAB HATCH SEAL $(277) $(282) FRET $(33) $(34)
FHTV-153 - PLS A1 COMMON CAB HATCH SEAL $(277) $(282) FRET $ - $ -
5. REVISE SECTION J ATTACHMENT 0018, ECPS INCORPORATED, DATED 18 JUNE 2012 TO REVISED ATTACHMENT 0018 DATED 22 AUGUST 2012, TO REMOVE CANCELLED ECPS FHTV-124R1 AND FHTV-153.
6. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITION OF THE BASIC CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00137) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE FY13 PRICING TO THE CONTRACT PRICE LIST FOR ONE TIME OPERATION NEEDS STATEMENT PROCUREMENT OF 150 HEMTT A4 C-KITS. HEMTT A4 C-KITS WILL BE FUNDED VIA DELIVERY ORDER 0084. REVISE SECTION J BY REVISING THE ATTACHMENT 0012 DATED 08/22/12 TO THE REVISED DATE OF 08/30/2012.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00139) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00139 TO FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLES CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE FY12 AND FY13 PRICING TO THE CONTRACT PRICE LIST FOR THE REPLACEMENT OF GOVERNMENT FURNISHED MATERIAL (GFM) CARCASS WHEEL/TIRE ASSEMBLIES WITH NEW WHEEL/TIRE ASSEMBLIES (AND ASSOCIATED STORAGE COSTS FOR THE CARCASS WHEEL/TIRES). THIS MODIFICATION ALSO INCORPORATES PRICING FY12 PRICING FOR THE TIRE MATERIAL DELTA COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH THE INSTALL OF TIRES ON NEW M1120 VEHICLES (AND ASSOCIATED WHEEL STORAGE).

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00140) awarded to OSHKOSH CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO ADD PRICING TO THE FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLES (FHTV) CONTRACT PRICE LIST FOR THE 12 MONTH (FISCAL YEAR 2013) EXTENSION OF TWO NON-LEAD AND ONE LEAD FIELD SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE (FSR) SUPPORTING ACTIVITIES IN AFGHANISTAN.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
